html:
The Harp Statue is a Structure that can be mined with a Pickaxe for 2-3 Marble. It looks like a headless angel with a harp in its hands.

Players may find a Harp Statue around the Wooden Thing in Sandbox Mode and easily in the Adventure Mode world, The Game is Afoot, as there is a large Chess Biome there.


Trivia

  • There is a head included in the TEX files. However, it's not used in-game.

Gallery

  • The Harp Statue when mined.
  • The Harp Statue when mined, almost broken.
  • Statue with its head as found in the game's files.
  • A Set Piece the Statue is found in.
  • On Concept Art from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Harp Statue concept art
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Don't Starve
Together
Harp Statue
Object Info
Renewable?
No
Source
Can be Mined
Chess
Resources
×2-3
Miscellaneous
"statueharp"
“What happened to the head?”
–Wilson
“Such a nice statue. Shame if something were to happen to it.”
–Willow
“Where is pretty music?”
–Wolfgang
“Maybe these statues will keep me company.”
–Wendy
“SOMEONE FORGOT TO INSTALL THE HEAD MODULE.”
–WX-78
“A simple statue.”
–Wickerbottom
“You lost your head, eh?”
–Woodie
“Not my best work.”
–Maxwell
“Who could this be modeled after? And where is his head?”
–Wagstaff
“It must be Gunnar. The snakes töök his head.”
–Wigfrid
“Someone took the head.”
–Webber
“No shoes, no... head... no service!”
–Walani
“Headless harpsmen.”
–Warly
“Yer missing ye head!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS HEADLESS STON'D UNPIG”
–Wilba
“Where'd head go?”
–Wormwood
“Wow. How does he play without looking at the strings?”
–Wheeler
“I don't know. Some fancy thing.”
–Winona
“Little cherub, little harp.”
–Wortox
“Someone broke it, florp.”
–Wurt
“I don't think it has an ear for music. Heh... good one, Walter.”
–Walter
“It's curious how they all seem to be broken in the same spot...”
–Wanda
The Harp Statue is a Structure that can be mined with a Pickaxe for 2-3 Marble. It looks like a headless angel with a harp in its hands.
Players may find a Harp Statue around the Wooden Thing in Sandbox Mode and easily in the Adventure Mode world, The Game is Afoot, as there is a large Chess Biome there.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
There is a head included in the TEX files. However, it's not used in-game.

The '''Harp Statue''' is a [[Structure]] that can be mined with a [[Pickaxe]] for 2-3 [[Marble]]. It looks like a headless angel with a harp in its hands.

Players may find a Harp Statue around the [[Wooden Thing]] in [[Sandbox Mode]] and easily in the [[Adventure Mode]] world, ''The Game is Afoot'', as there is a large [[Chess|Chess Biome]] there.


=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* There is a head included in the [[TEX]] files. However, it's not used in-game.
